key.name: instance-url
key.description: The URL of your Mastodon instance (e.g., https://mastodon.social)

key.name: access-token
key.description: Your Mastodon access token with read:notifications scope

key.name: last-read-id
key.description: ID of the most recently read notification, used to count unread

key.name: poll-interval
key.description: How often to check for new notifications, in seconds (minimum 30)
